summary: An e-commerce platform for Bhai Bhai Fertilizer company to sell fertilizer products online
architectural_notes: Shopping cart and order processing system
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Bhai Bhai Fertilizer company logo with agricultural theme in green and earth tones (logo.dim_200x200.png)
- Hero banner image showing lush green farmland with fertilizer application (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Generic fertilizer product bag illustration with green and brown colors (product-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication using Internet Identity to allow family members to securely log in with passkeys or social login
Build a messaging system that allows family members to send and receive text messages
Create a simple and intuitive chat interface showing a conversation view with message history
Implement a contact list or family member list showing all registered users in the app
Design a warm, family-friendly visual theme with soft colors, comfortable typography, and an approachable layout that feels welcoming and easy to navigate
Remove or reduce any CSS blur effects that are making the interface difficult to read or interact with
Improve overall interface responsiveness and interaction patterns to match WhatsApp-style usability expectations
Review and optimize ChatView background styling to ensure it does not interfere with content readability
Replace the family messaging application with an e-commerce platform for Bhai Bhai Fertilizer company
Implement a product catalog system to display fertilizer products with name, description, price, and product images
Create a shopping cart system that allows customers to add products, adjust quantities, and view cart total
Implement a checkout process that allows customers to complete purchases with order confirmation
Implement customer authentication using Internet Identity to allow customers to securely log in and manage their orders

Design a professional e-commerce visual theme for a fertilizer company with agricultural colors (greens and earth tones), clear product photography layouts, and trust-building design elements that convey reliability and expertise in the agriculture sector

new_feature_requests.summary: Product catalog system to display fertilizer products
Shopping cart and checkout system for purchasing products
User accounts for customers to manage orders
